mismatched_fact_examples.truth_value: Among 10 ML models, SVR achieved R²=0.85, RMSE=0.39; after incorporating modified solid solution strengthening, R² improved to 0.89, RMSE reduced to 0.31.
mismatched_fact_examples.prediction_value: Feature engineering: 41 features were collected and standardized; recursive feature elimination (RFE) wrapped with RF, LightGBM and XGBoost, combined with Pearson correlation screening (|PCC| ≥ 0.95), reduced candidates to 9; exhaustive screening identified the optimal 3-feature combination {δ_Ec, D_Ec, G} with the lowest cross-validation RMSE of 0.257.
mismatched_fact_examples.truth_normalized: among 10 ml models, svr achieved r2=0.85, rmse=0.39; after incorporating modified solid solution strengthening, r2 improved to 0.89, rmse reduced to 0.31.

llm_judge_candidates.truth_value: Among 10 ML models, SVR achieved R²=0.85, RMSE=0.39; after incorporating modified solid solution strengthening, R² improved to 0.89, RMSE reduced to 0.31.
llm_judge_candidates.prediction_value: Feature engineering: 41 features were collected and standardized; recursive feature elimination (RFE) wrapped with RF, LightGBM and XGBoost, combined with Pearson correlation screening (|PCC| ≥ 0.95), reduced candidates to 9; exhaustive screening identified the optimal 3-feature combination {δ_Ec, D_Ec, G} with the lowest cross-validation RMSE of 0.257.

llm_judge_candidates.truth_value: Feature engineering revealed that shear modulus G, difference in cohesive energy δ_Ec, and local cohesive energy mismatch D_Ec are the key features for microhardness.

llm_judge_candidates.truth_value: Inverse design using FA achieved a predicted maximum microhardness of 733.59 HV.
llm_judge_candidates.prediction_value: Experimental validation errors: Sample 1 predicted 521 HV versus experimental 515 HV (1.17 % error); Sample 2 predicted 490 HV versus 500 HV (2.00 %); Sample 3 predicted 415 HV versus 424 HV (2.09 %); the minimum error of 1.17 % is lower than previously reported 2.01 % (Ren et al.) and 2.96 % (Huang et al.) for high-entropy alloy hardness prediction.
